title: Ordinate Dimension Annotation
description: Defines an ordinate dimension with a shared origin and dimension line(s).

type.description: Direction of the ordinate dimension, horizontal (X axis) or vertical (Y axis)

dimensionGroup.description: Collection of dimension lines belonging to this ordinate dimension group

items.description: Single dimension line of the ordinate dimension

logicalId.description: Unique handle identifying this dimension line

isOrigin.description: Is this dimension line the origin line of the ordinate dimension

attachmentPoint.description: Point of attachment on the referenced edge

textPosition.description: Position of the text for this dimension line

displayedValue.description: Formatted value displayed for this dimension line

isDangling.description: Is dimension line dangling or not

textAbove.description: Above text of the dimension line

textBelow.description: Below text of the dimension line

textOverride.description: Override to replace the standard dimension line text

formatting.description: Dimension formatting override for this dimension line

isPrecisionOverridden.description: True if the dimension line precision is overridden.

unit.description: Unit for the measurement, by default it is drawings unit enum value DRAWING.

measurement.description: Returns the measurement (DXF 42) stored in this Dimension line

boundingBoxPoints.description: Bounding box points of each ordinate dimension line

displayParentheses.description: True if parentheses enabled for dimension

inspection.description: True if inspection enabled for dimension
